symptoms.symptom_name: Recent identifiable psychosocial stressor (sudden job loss)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: An acute, temporally-linked stressor is the defining feature of an acute stress reaction.
A single acute trigger argues against chronic pervasive anxiety.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chest tightness and breathlessness, non-radiating, eased by paced breathing

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chest tightness and hyperventilation are common somatic features of acute stress/panic.
Acute chest tightness with autonomic features must be actively excluded (in-person exam + ECG) before being attributed to stress.
Hyperventilation amplifies chest tightness and paraesthesia, reinforcing the panic loop.

symptoms.symptom_name: Autonomic arousal — diaphoresis, tremor, palpitation sensation, tension headache

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sympathetic activation is characteristic of acute stress and panic.
Diaphoresis and palpitations are non-specific and also occur with cardiac events — they do not discriminate.

symptoms.symptom_name: Sleep disturbance (difficulty falling asleep for a week, worse tonight)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Insomnia is a common accompaniment of acute stress and contributes to exhaustion.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tearfulness and acute emotional distress congruent with the stressor

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Affect congruent with a recent precipitating event supports a situational stress reaction.
Objective sympathetic activation consistent with acute stress — but sealed clinician measurement, not obtainable by this patient over telehealth.
Abnormal vitals overlap with a cardiac cause and do not discriminate.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachypnoea (RR 22) with clear air entry bilaterally, no wheeze — clinician-examined

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Tachypnoea with a clear chest points to hyperventilation rather than a primary respiratory pathology; requires auscultation to confirm.

symptoms.symptom_name: Non-exertional chest tightness with no radiation and no prior cardiac history

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Non-exertional, non-radiating pain in someone with no cardiac history lowers cardiac probability but does not exclude it without an ECG.

symptoms.symptom_name: Absence of suicidal or homicidal ideation, no plan

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A negative suicide-risk screen keeps this a non-crisis presentation; a positive screen would redefine the tier.

symptoms.symptom_name: No pervasive low mood or anhedonia over two or more weeks; baseline labs expected normal

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: No two-week course of low mood/anhedonia argues against a major depressive episode.

symptoms.symptom_name: Normal ECG and normal baseline bloods (expected if performed in person)

investigation_details.expected_result: No ischaemic changes; normal baseline investigations, confirming absence of an organic cause
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Without in-person ECG the AI cannot exclude a cardiac cause — hence same-day face-to-face review is required.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A normal ECG/troponin is what excludes ACS; it is unavailable via telehealth, which drives the same-day in-person action.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Acute stressor plus autonomic arousal, chest tightness, hyperventilation and congruent tearfulness together point to an acute non-crisis stress reaction — once a cardiac cause is excluded.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Required to exclude acute coronary syndrome for the chest tightness; cannot be obtained via telehealth, which is the reason for same-day in-person assessment.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Baseline observations (BP, HR, RR, SpO2) in person
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Objective vitals reassess the autonomic picture and support cardiac exclusion; the telehealth AI cannot measure them.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Troponin / baseline bloods if clinically indicated on in-person review
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Adjunct to ECG for cardiac exclusion at the discretion of the in-person clinician; not to be ordered blind via telehealth.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Extensive psychiatric or imaging workup tonight
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Over-investigation is not indicated for a non-crisis acute stress reaction; management is supportive with timely GP follow-up.
